3-in-1 Strategy 🪂

Farm Hyperbridge + Base + Soneium at once. 

@hyperbridge raised $5M and still tokenless

     ➖go to ‘inscriptions’
     ➖send message from base to Soneium 

That’s all for now! Stay updated https://t.co/XR64YKr7Rm
